Image  Google  data-portal-copyright  Image  Google  data-has-syndication-rights  1  src    strip all crop 0,0,100,100      figcaption   Live Search  can describe what your cameras see, not just what they ve seen.   Image  Google   figcaption    figure   p class  has-text-align-none  Google Home chief  a href    data-type  link  data-id    Kattukaran announced  a  several updates to the smart home platform that fix a long list of annoyances and idiosyncrasies. There's also one noteworthy new addition  the introduction of  Live Search  for your cameras.  p   p class  has-text-align-none  So, instead of Gemini only knowing about things that have already happened, it now understands what it sees in your live camera feeds. That means you can ask things like,  Hey Google, is there a car in the driveway?  Live Search requires a subscription to the  a href    plan of Google Home Premium  a  which costs  20 month or  200 year.  p   p class  has-text-align-none  Gemini for Home is now also using updated models. A change that should improv    p   p  a href    the full story at The Verge.  a   p
